# Studio Chenille

> Studio Chenille is a luxury interior design firm based in Ascot, United Kingdom. We specialise in residential, hotel, hospitality, and commercial interior design across the UK and internationally.

## About

Studio Chenille is a team of dedicated and dynamic professionals — designers and managers who collaborate to create luxurious and innovative interiors tailored to each client's unique vision. Based in Ascot, Windsor and Maidenhead, we handle interior remodelling, new construction, and bespoke finishing work across private residences, boutique hotels, corporate offices, show homes, and leisure facilities.

## Contact

- Location: Ascot, Windsor and Maidenhead, England, United Kingdom
- Phone: +44 (0) 1344 249233
- Email: info@studiochenille.com
- Website: https://studiochenille.com

## Services

- [Residential Interior Design](https://studiochenille.com/residential-interior-design.html): Bespoke home interiors from single rooms to full property transformations
- [Hotel & Hospitality Design](https://studiochenille.com/hotel-hospitality-design.html): Boutique hotel suites, lobbies, and guest spaces
- [Commercial Interior Design](https://studiochenille.com/commercial-interior-design.html): Offices, retail spaces, and corporate environments
- [Show Home Design](https://studiochenille.com/show-home-design.html): Aspirational interiors for property developments
- Bespoke Furnishing: Custom furniture, lighting, and accessories sourced from artisans worldwide
- Leisure & Wellness: Spa and wellness facility design

## Our Design Process

1. Concept Creation — Understanding your vision, lifestyle, and aspirations
2. Design Development — Detailed plans with materials, fixtures, and colour palettes
3. Selections — Curating bespoke furniture, lighting, fabrics, and accessories
4. Planning & Specifications — Floor plans, elevations, and construction drawings
5. Construction — Overseeing all construction and installation work
6. Procurement — Full project management, budgeting, and logistics
7. The Grand Reveal — Final staging, professional photography, and handover

## Areas We Serve

- [Areas Overview](https://studiochenille.com/areas-we-serve.html)
- Berkshire & Surrey: Ascot, Windsor, Sunningdale, Bracknell, Maidenhead, Wokingham, Virginia Water, Weybridge, Esher, Cobham, Oxshott, Guildford, Walton-on-Thames, Chobham
- Buckinghamshire: Beaconsfield, Gerrards Cross, Marlow
- Central London: Chelsea, Kensington, Mayfair, Belgravia
